reforms.description: The Italian government introduced a constitutional amendment and secondary legislation to establish a balanced-budget rule and a fiscal council, aimed at improving long-term fiscal sustainability.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The balanced-budget rule and fiscal council are expected to enhance fiscal discipline, which can lead to a more stable economic environment conducive to investment and growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The balanced-budget rule and fiscal council were established as planned.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant structural change in Italy's fiscal policy framework, aimed at ensuring long-term fiscal sustainability and improving economic stability.
reforms.source_quote: A constitutional amendment approved in April 2012 and secondary legislation approved in December 2012 provide for a balanced-budget rule, to come into effect in 2014, and a fiscal council.

reforms.description: Italy has simplified and rationalized public support for business R&D and innovation, aiming to create a balanced mix of direct and indirect measures to enhance innovation capacity across firms, including SMEs.
reforms.package_name: Cresci Italia and Semplifica Italia Laws
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining support mechanisms, the reform is expected to enhance the effectiveness of R&D investments, thereby fostering innovation and productivity growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The simplification measures were enacted as part of the Cresci Italia and Semplifica Italia laws.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant adjustment in the public support landscape for innovation, which is crucial for enhancing the business environment and fostering R&D activities.
reforms.source_quote: Simplify and rationalize public support for business R&D and innovation, by achieving an appropriate mix of direct and indirect measures.

reforms.description: The Italian government has introduced a tax credit on an experimental basis for companies that fund research projects at universities or public research bodies, aiming to incentivize private sector investment in R&D.
reforms.package_name: Cresci Italia and Semplifica Italia Laws
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This tax credit is designed to stimulate private investment in R&D, which can lead to increased innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax credit was introduced as part of the broader reform package aimed at enhancing R&D investment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The introduction of this tax credit is a significant step towards encouraging private sector R&D investment, which is essential for fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Introduction of a tax credit on an experimental basis for companies that fund research projects at universities or public research bodies.

reforms.description: Measures were adopted to support start-ups, including tax exemptions and simplified regulations, aimed at fostering the creation and growth of innovative firms.
reforms.package_name: Cresci Italia and Semplifica Italia Laws
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By reducing barriers and providing financial incentives, these measures are expected to enhance the entrepreneurial ecosystem and stimulate innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures to support start-ups were enacted as part of the Cresci Italia and Semplifica Italia laws.
reforms.importance_rationale: These measures represent a significant effort to enhance the start-up ecosystem, which is crucial for driving innovation and economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Several measures were adopted to support start-ups, including tax exemptions and simplified regulation.

reforms.description: Italy introduced a complicated system of support for high-technology start-ups in late 2012, aimed at enhancing innovation and entrepreneurship.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: This support is intended to stimulate entrepreneurship and innovation, potentially leading to increased economic activity and job creation.
reforms.status_evidence: The system of support for high-technology start-ups was introduced in late 2012.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in the support framework for start-ups, aiming to enhance innovation capacity in the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The most recent being a complicated system of support for high-technology start-ups introduced in late 2012.

reforms.description: Italy plans to simplify and rationalize the multitude of policies supporting innovation to strengthen their impact and improve targeting of government subsidies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining innovation policies, the government aims to enhance their effectiveness and better allocate resources to productive innovation activities.
reforms.status_evidence: A comprehensive simplification and rationalisation of the current multitude of policies supporting innovation would help to strengthen their impact.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it addresses the complexity of existing policies, aiming for a more coherent and effective innovation strategy.
reforms.source_quote: A comprehensive simplification and rationalisation of the current multitude of policies supporting innovation would help to strengthen their impact.

reforms.description: Italy aims to simplify and rationalize current innovation support policies, focusing on tying R&D tax credits more closely to productive sources of innovation and emphasizing selective subsidies through competitive grants.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By aligning R&D tax credits with productive innovation sources, the reform is expected to enhance the effectiveness of public funding and stimulate private sector R&D investment.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform to simplify and rationalize innovation support policies has been proposed.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant adjustment to existing innovation support mechanisms, aiming to improve their efficiency and effectiveness in fostering R&D.
reforms.source_quote: Simplify and rationalise current innovation support policies, tie R&D tax credits more closely to the most productive sources of innovation.
